steps.description: Pre-deployment health check to verify production baseline
Deploy wp-content directory with automatic exclusions
steps.notes: Includes automated td-env-config.php deployment via mu-plugins location

migrations.description: Create td_audit_log table for compliance tracking
Add role column and update profile method values
Add approver_id and comments columns for approval tracking
Add request_id and record_id columns (PENG-001 v2.0)
Create td_id_sequences table for ID generation
Add assigned_by column for assignment tracking

steps.description: Apply database migrations for v3.6.0 (all migrations from v3.4.0 onwards)
steps.notes: Includes user request system, audit logging, and Record ID system. Upload SQL files via SCP, then execute via wp db query in order.

steps.description: Verify env config automatically loaded from mu-plugins
Post-deployment health check to verify all components
steps.notes: Must pass all checks for deployment to be considered successful

features: PENG-054: API Security Hardening (XML-RPC disabled, REST API auth, AJAX monitoring)
Record ID System (PENG-001 v2.0): request_id, record_id columns, td_id_sequences table
Landing pages for all 5 roles (Employers, Candidates, Scouts, Managers, Operators)

automated: Health check script (pre and post deployment)
manual: Login as each test user (candidate_test, employer_test, scout_test, operator_test, manager_test)
Verify redirect to correct landing page for each role
Check all 7 menu items visible in navigation
Test Manager Admin page (approve/reject user requests)
Verify API security (REST API requires auth, XML-RPC disabled)

steps.description: Revert main branch to v3.5.1 tag if critical issues arise
Restore database from latest backup if migrations cause issues
Deactivate new plugins if they cause conflicts
